questions.title: What are the project completion times?
questions.content: The duration depends on technical complexity. An agile MVP typically takes 4-6 weeks, while a complete SaaS ecosystem requires 3-5 months. We work in iterative cycles (Sprints) with bi-monthly deliveries.

questions.title: Do you offer maintenance after delivery?
questions.content: We systematically include 3 months of corrective maintenance. Beyond that, our Tier-Support contracts guarantee dependency updates, infrastructure monitoring, and proactive evolution.

questions.title: Do you deliver the source code?
questions.content: Absolutely. You own the total intellectual property. Upon delivery, we perform a complete transfer of GitHub/GitLab repositories, technical documentation, and infrastructure secrets.

questions.title: What technologies do you use?
questions.content: We specialize in the modern TypeScript stack: Next.js, Node.js, and PostgreSQL. For mobile, we favor React Native. Our infrastructures are deployed via Terraform on AWS or Vercel.

questions.title: How do you guarantee code quality?
questions.content: Every line of code goes through Code Review. We enforce high unit test coverage and use static analysis tools to ensure long-term maintainability.

phases.title: Discovery & Architecture
phases.description: Audit of existing infrastructures and database modeling. We don't code before having a flawless technical roadmap.

phases.title: High-Perf Design
phases.description: Creation of an atomic Design System. Focus on perceived loading speed and fluid micro-interactions.
